commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR extends the skill publish form to import SKILL.md descriptions into Short summary, show a dismissible discovery banner, add tests, and raise the publish summary limit from 200 to 300 characters.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: the PR clears summaryTouchedRef during file upload, while the submit path only sends an empty summary when that ref remains true. I did not run the browser flow locally.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve the user-edit sentinel while keeping the imported-description banner behavior.

target.title: feat(publish): prefill short summary from SKILL.md + discovery banner
target.body:
## Summary

- Auto-populate the **Short summary** field on skill publish from `SKILL.md` frontmatter (`metadata.description` or top-level `description`), matching how display name/slug prefill already works.
- Show a dismissible in-field recommendation banner when the summary was imported, with copy that explains the agent-vs-discovery audience difference and tips for better discoverability.
- Reset prefill state on re-upload/clear so a new `SKILL.md` can replace a manually edited summary; measure banner height with `ResizeObserver` for correct textarea padding.
- Raise publish summary limit from 200 → 300 characters (UI + `convex/lib/skillPublish.ts`).

Follow-up to #2851.

## Demo

[![Watch demo — skill publish short summary prefill](https://humble-garden-mbyw.here.now/droppie-2026-06-25T12-37-06Z.png)](https://evoked-mullet-4qa9.here.now/droppie-2026-06-25T12-41-34Z.mp4)

**[▶ Watch demo video](https://evoked-mullet-4qa9.here.now/droppie-2026-06-25T12-41-34Z.mp4)**

## Screenshot

![Skill publish short summary prefill banner](https://humble-garden-mbyw.here.now/droppie-2026-06-25T12-37-06Z.png)

## Test plan

- [x] `VITE_CONVEX_URL=https://example.invalid bunx vitest run src/__tests__/skills-publish-route.test.tsx src/lib/skillFrontmatter.test.ts`
- [x] `bun run ci:static`
- [ ] Manual: upload a skill with `description` in `SKILL.md` frontmatter at `/skills/publish` — summary prefills, banner shows, dismiss works, manual edits stick, re-upload resets prefill
